  • For Patients
  • Publications Hub
  • Education

    Education

    The EFP's work in education includes a set of curricular guidelines for undergraduate dental education, a three-year accredited programme for postgraduate education in periodontology, and some continuing education tools for reference and consultation of dental professionals all along their careers. Besides, this area is the home of the 'EFP Alumni' section.

    • Undergraduate education
    • Postgraduate education

      • EFP Postgraduate Symposium
      • EFP Postgraduate Education Committee

  • EuroPerio

EuroPerio, the world’s leading congress in periodontology and implant dentistry

Bringing together over 10,000 delegates from more than 100 countries, EuroPerio highlights the continued global importance of periodontology and implant dentistry.

The congress features a rich features a rich and diverse scientific programme, including live surgeries, interactive sessions, and many other innovative formats. With morethan 150 top speakers from around the world, all recognised leaders in their fields, it is the ideal place to meet colleagues, exchange insights, and discover the latest developments in periodontology and implant dentistry.

Held every three years, EuroPerio has become the benchmark global congress for dental professionals. The exhibition showcases cutting-edge products and technologies, while the poster area presents over 1,000 new scientific contributions, offering an unparalleled view of current research.

In short, EuroPerio is the place to be for anyone committed to staying at the forefront of periodontal science and clinical practice.

EuroPerio at a glance

+10,000

delegates

Delegates from

107

countries

150

top speakers

+110

exhibitors

122

sessions

Save the date:
the next EuroPerio will happen in Munich, Germany from 10 -13 May, 2028.

Learn more about EuroPerio12




Our most recent event

If you are new to EuroPerio, our galleries provide a visual introduction to the congress, showcasing the atmosphere, scientific sessions, and networking opportunities.

EuroPerio11 photo gallery
 

Every three years we hold EuroPerio, the leading global congress in periodontology and implant dentistry. To see past editions and learn more about what we offer at the event, visit:


Previous EuroPerio photo galleries




FAQ

What is EuroPerio?

EuroPerio is the world’s leading congress in periodontology and implant dentistry, held every three years. It features a comprehensive scientific programme with live surgeries, interactive sessions, and presentations from more than 150 internationally recognised experts. It has become the global benchmark event for dental professionals looking to stay at the forefront of periodontal science and clinical practice.

When was the last EuroPerio held?

The most recent EuroPerio took place in May 2025 in Vienna, bringing together dental professionals from around the world for an outstanding scientific and educational programme. If you want to know more, head to the event summary

What can I expect from the scientific programme at EuroPerio?

EuroPerio offers a rich and diverse scientific programme, including live surgical demonstrations, interactive formats, keynote lectures, and panel discussions. The congress also features an extensive poster area showcasing over 1,000 new scientific contributions, providing unparalleled insight into the latest research and clinical innovations.

Who should attend EuroPerio?

EuroPerio is ideal for periodontists, implant dentists, dental hygienists, researchers, students, and all oral health professionals interested in the latest advances in periodontology and implant dentistry. It is the perfect environment to meet colleagues, exchange insights, and engage with global leaders in the field.

 

What will I find in the EuroPerio exhibition area?

The EuroPerio exhibition showcases cutting-edge technologies, products, and solutions from leading dental companies worldwide. Attendees can discover innovations in surgical instruments, digital dentistry, regenerative materials, diagnostics, and more, making it a key destination for staying updated on market developments.

 

When and where will the next EuroPerio take place?

The next edition, EuroPerio12, will be held in Munich, Germany, from 10 to 13 May 2028. (Add this event to your calendar) This highly anticipated event will once again bring together thousands of dental professionals from around the globe for four days of education, networking, and scientific excellence.
